story: US-005-2: TicketActionPanel Component — State Machine Buttons and Dialogs

testModifications.reasoning: No test files were modified by the implementer. All tests are pre-written acceptance tests.

criteria.criterion: AC1: accepts a ticket prop typed to the generated Ticket schema
AC2: CREATED status renders Verify and Reject buttons only
AC3: VERIFIED status renders Start button only
AC4: IN_PROGRESS status renders Submit Fix and Reject buttons only
AC5: VERIFY_FIX status renders Approve Fix and Fail Fix buttons only
AC6: CLOSED and REJECTED statuses render no action buttons
AC7: Verify, Reject, Submit Fix, Fail Fix open a Dialog with Textarea before API call
AC8: Start, Approve Fix call endpoints immediately without a dialog
AC9: Component emits 'transition' event after each successful API response

reasoning: All 36 tests pass. Implementation is clean and follows Vue 3 Composition API best practices with proper TypeScript typing. Component correctly implements state machine button rendering based on ticket status, manages dialog state for comment-required actions, and properly emits 'transition' event after successful API calls. API endpoints are constructed correctly including verify-fix query parameter handling (approve=true|false). Error handling is comprehensive with user-friendly toast notifications. Code is 124 lines, well-organized with clear separation of concerns. No code quality issues detected.
